## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch follows the `feat/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, or `docs/` convention.
- [ ] I ran the script locally and the change works against at least one
      target channel.
- [ ] I did not commit any real `.env`, session file, or downloaded artifact.
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if appropriate.
